prompt: Hand category: two overcards with no pair. Board fit: the hand has not paired the board and has no clear draw. Classify the range bucket.
why_v1: Missed means the hand has not made a pair and does not have a clean draw to anchor it.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. This is missed because the hand has no pair, no made-hand fit, and no clear draw on this board.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. This is missed because the board did not connect with the hand as a made pair or clear draw.
